what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 stroke-only SVG icon showing a simple building facade with windows and a circular cost-style marker over the lower right.
observations: Root svg uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with no fill and currentColor stroke.
Stroke styling is set inline with 1.5 width, round caps, and round joins.
The building is drawn as a polygonal outline with four short window marks.
A circular overlay at cx 18 cy 17 contains vertical and horizontal strokes resembling a cost or currency mark.
standouts: Combines a building outline with an overlaid circular cost marker.
Uses themeable currentColor rather than fixed colors.
All geometry is expressed with path and circle primitives.
conventions: Follows a compact line-icon SVG convention with 24x24 viewBox and inline stroke attributes.
Uses no ids, classes, gradients, masks, or embedded metadata.
Keeps the asset self-contained and color-inheriting.
notes: A self-contained building-cost line icon suitable for UI use where inherited text color should control the stroke.
questions: Is the marker inside the circle intended to read as a specific currency symbol or a generic cost indicator?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a building-cost icon, and the SVG depicts a building with a cost-style circular overlay.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a compact, reusable icon for building-related cost, pricing, or budget contexts.
novelty: The distinct element is the lower-right circular cost marker layered onto a simple building facade.
contribution: Contributes a themeable stroke SVG representation of building cost that can be kept as a reusable visual token in an icon ledger or fused design asset set.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor stroke SVG icon depicting a building with window marks and an overlaid circular cost indicator.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing building cost, pricing, or budget concepts as a compact UI icon.
